subject: Action needed: koi planning in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q2 review | INIT-1841
body: Here is a progress summary for the koi plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Katherine Johnson as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-1841.
